'''Atoko''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]] and, as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the commander of the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fifth Fleet]].

==Biography==
Atoko rose through the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] ranks to become an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]], taking over command of the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Fifth Fleet]] by [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. He participated in the [[Battle of Kuat (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kuat]] before [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] withdrew the Fifth and ordered them to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], where the Fifth protected Caedus's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']], while Caedus [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|bombarded Kashyyyk]], where the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] were sheltering the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], newly declared traitors to the Galactic Alliance. The Fifth was badly savaged when [[Confederation]] forces arrived to relieve Kashyyyk, and Atoko prepared to scuttle his ships rather than let them fall into the hands of Wookiee boarding parties. Caedus ordered Atoko to continue the seemingly suicidal fight, and the last elements of the Fifth were only saved when Caedus, using his [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]] abilities in conjunction with those of [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Alema Rar]], was able to run the Confederation gauntlet. After the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] attack on the [[Council of Moffs/Legends|Moff Council]] during the [[Second Battle of Roche]], Atoko was assigned to [[Battle of Mandalore (Second Galactic Civil War)|attack]] the [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalorian homeworld]] with the remnants of the Fifth Fleet and neutralize the threat they represented to Caedus. During the battle, Atoko release tons of a [[nanovirus]] targeted against [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], rendering him and anyone who carried the [[Clan Fett|Fett gene]] unable to set foot on Mandalore, possibly killing the surviving [[Clone trooper/Legends|clones]] from the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and any children or grandchildren they may have had.
